entities.name: COMPREHENSIVE PROJECT ON RICE FALLOW MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A transformative initiative launched for the intensification of pulses in rabi fallows in Odisha

entities.name: DIRECTORATE OF AGRICULTURE AND FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The government body of Odisha that launched the Rice Fallow Management project

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: The Indian state where the project is implemented

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops targeted for intensification to address food security and income

entities.name: RABI FALLOWS
entities.description: Post-rainy season fallow lands used for pulse cultivation

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: A primary goal of the project to be addressed through enhanced pulse production

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL CHALLENGES
entities.description: Issues the project aims to address through increased pulse production

entities.name: FARM INCOME
entities.description: An economic outcome the project aims to improve for farmers

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, a partner in project implementation

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A government department partnering for the implementation of pulse demonstrations

entities.name: NGO
entities.description: A local non-governmental organization partnering for the implementation of pulse demonstrations

entities.name: KORAPUT DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Odisha where pulse demonstrations are implemented

entities.name: DEMONSTRATIONS
entities.description: The implementation approach used to showcase pulse cultivation across 5000 hectares
